log.context: The main session dismissed this error as cosmetic. But it might be the actual cause. The plugin loads as `discord-clungus@inline` (because `--plugin-dir` creates an inline marketplace), but the channel entry `plugin:discord-clungus@local` refers to the `@local` marketplace, which is a different lookup path. The MCP server connects and tools work (reply, fetch_messages, react), but the **channel notification routing** -- which determines how `notifications/claude/channel` gets delivered as real-t...(truncated)
